name: Goliath
short_description: Goliath is a Sci-Fi Multiplayer Shooter from 3 Feet From Gold Games. Master an ever-growing roster of legendary characters with powerful abilities, dashes and weapons, and experience strategic multiplayer and innovative gameplay in the arena!
detailed_description:
Kindly be informed that the Goliath game remains under active development. We are committed to incorporating forthcoming enhancements, bug fixes, listening to community feedback, all of which will encompass a variety of game modes, additional maps, and diverse character options coming in the form of DLC packs coming soon.

He was an inevitable wave that washed away all our world’s governing
systems, alliances, and protectors. Our world was no match for a
ruler from the stars with his superior strength and exhaustive
knowledge of our world.

And so our world became his.
Every year since our planet has come under his “protection”,
Goliath hosts a tournament of the best warriors from what few
regions we have left. His hidden agenda is to use these games to seek
out and dispose of any potential threats.

Our goal, as warriors, is to win the tournament for the right to
challenge Goliath and take back our freedom!
